goals.title: Perforce System 연동을 실제 서버를 켜서 Atlas Client에서 Add, Sync, Edit 동작이 실제로...
goals.objective: Perforce System 연동을 실제 서버를 켜서 Atlas Client에서 Add, Sync, Edit 동작이 실제로 되는지 검증하고, 실패하면 최소 수정한다. Evidence must include real server/client Add Sync Edit scenario artifacts, RED->GREEN automated tests for any production fix, cleanup receipts, and final reviewer approval if implementation touches multiple files.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: start isolated p4d on localhost:16671 and Atlas on localhost:8792 with ATLAS_SCM_PROVIDER=perforce, ATLAS_SCM_ADAPTER_PERFORCE=core.scm_perforce:PerforceP4Adapter, P4PORT=localhost:16671, P4USER=atlasqa, P4CLIENT=atlas_ulw_c001; create QA IP ulw_p4_c001 with one submitted depot file and one new local file; open http://127.0.0.1:8792/?backend=live&ip=ulw_p4_c001, select SCM/Perforce tab, click Add for new file, click Edit for synced file, click Sync after local overwrite. PASS iff browser artifact shows pending add and edit actions and final synced file content equals depot content.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d66-9e15-7790-a750-ae8a7df43b13/evidence/C001-browser-add-edit-sync.json plus screenshot .png; automated RED/GREEN: frontend/atlas/__tests__/perforce-sync.test.tsx::renders Add Edit Sync controls and posts edit action; tests/test_scm_perforce_adapter.py::test_edit_paths_runs_p4_edit.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d66-9e15-7790-a750-ae8a7df43b13/evidence/C001-browser-add-edit-sync.json and .png show browser Add/Edit/Sync; assertions openedContainsAdd=true openedContainsEdit=true finalSyncContentMatchesDepot=true | cleanup: .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d66-9e15-7790-a750-ae8a7df43b13/evidence/C001-cleanup.txt confirms atlas/p4 ports empty and QA dirs removed

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: start isolated p4d on localhost:16672 and Atlas on localhost:8793 with Perforce env; POST curl -i http://127.0.0.1:8793/api/scm/edit with JSON {ip:ulw_p4_c002, paths:[../../.env]} then GET /api/scm/pane. PASS iff response is HTTP 200 JSON ok:false with error 'no valid paths to edit/open' and pane/p4 opened has no pending files.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d66-9e15-7790-a750-ae8a7df43b13/evidence/C002-http-malformed-edit.txt shows curl HTTP 200 ok:false error 'no valid paths to edit/open', pane pending:[], and p4 opened reports file(s) not opened | cleanup: .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d66-9e15-7790-a750-ae8a7df43b13/evidence/C002-cleanup.txt confirms atlas/p4 ports empty and QA dirs removed

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: with ATLAS_SCM_PROVIDER=perforce, create a temp git IP and call curl -i 'http://127.0.0.1:8794/api/git/status?ip=ulw_git_c003&provider=git' against live Atlas. PASS iff HTTP 200 JSON provider is git, branch is ipbranch, and Perforce default env does not override the explicit git provider.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d66-9e15-7790-a750-ae8a7df43b13/evidence/C003-http-git-override.txt shows curl HTTP 200 with provider git, branch ipbranch while ATLAS_SCM_PROVIDER=perforce | cleanup: .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d66-9e15-7790-a750-ae8a7df43b13/evidence/C003-cleanup.txt confirms atlas port empty and temp git IP removed

goals.blockedReason: Perforce live QA and final review passed, but terminal complete checkpoint is blocked by Codex goal objective mismatch: get_goal is an already-completed legacy lint goal, and create_goal cannot create the Perforce aggregate goal because this thread already has that completed goal. CLI refused --status complete for this reason; use a fresh/no-goal context or clear the old goal to terminally checkpoint this OMO story.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d66-9e15-7790-a750-ae8a7df43b13/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e7d66-9e15-7790-a750-ae8a7df43b13/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
